zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Totehyll於1506年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特時，他的父親Humphrey de Totehyll24歲，母親Elizabeth Wood21歲。他於1526年與Elizabeth Mason在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1554年11月10日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Totehyll was born in 1506, in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Humphrey de Totehyll, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Wood, was 21. He married Elizabeth Mason in 1526, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 November 1554, in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Totehyll est né en 1506, à Woodford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey de Totehyll, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wood, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mason en 1526, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1554, à Woodford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Woodford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Totehyll 1506 in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey de Totehyll 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Wood 21. Er hat 1526 in England Elizabeth Mason geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. November 1554 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Totehyll è nato il nel 1506 nel Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Humphrey de Totehyll, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Wood, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mason nel 1526, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 novembre 1554, nel Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Totehyllが1506年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウッドフォードで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Totehyllは24歳，母Elizabeth Woodは21歳であった。1526年にイギリスでElizabeth Masonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1554年11月10日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウッドフォードで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウッドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Totehyll(이)가 1506년 영국 노르섬프토실르 우드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey de Totehyll(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wood(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1526년 영국에서 Elizabeth Mason(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1554년 11월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 우드퍼드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 우드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Totehyll nasceu em 1506, em Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey de Totehyll, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wood, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mason em 1526, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1554, em Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Totehyll родился в 1506 г. в местности вудфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey de Totehyll было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wood, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mason в 1526 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 ноября 1554 г. в местности вудфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности вудфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Totehyll nació en 1506, en Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey de Totehyll, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wood, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Mason en 1526, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1554, en Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
